name: Chocolate-Almond Balls
recipeInstructions: Combine first 5 ingredients in a large bowl; stir well. Shape into 1-inch balls, and chill until firm. Place candy coating in top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low; cook until candy coating melts, stirring frequently. Dip chocolate balls in melted candy coating, and coat well. Place on wax paper to dry. Melt semisweet chocolate in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly. Remove from heat; stir well. Drizzle over candy-coated balls. Store in an airtight container. Yield: 4 dozen.
